title: Create AgentLoop: sequential multi-step orchestrator
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/promptComposer.ts (lines 247-349: prompt composition pattern for assistant)
acceptance_criteria: AgentLoop class exports execute(input, mode): Promise<AgentLoopResult>
Uses TaskDecomposer to break input into plan
Executes each step sequentially, updating status fields
Returns AgentLoopResult with plan, finalOutput, completedSteps, status
Tracks state transitions: planning → executing → completed/failed
On step failure, marks step as failed and returns status='failed' with partial results
